rationale: Both papers centrally study how satisfaction ratings translate into downstream loyalty behavior (repurchase/loyalty), and the cited paper specifically models heterogeneity/nonlinearity in that translation, which aligns closely with the citing paper’s stated contribution on when satisfaction fails to convert to loyalty. Given this strong construct-level overlap and plausible foundational/comparison role (despite only DOI-level match evidence), this is not a safe obvious-mention-only drop.
